steps.title: Identify the career claim
steps.content: The underlined sentence says audience interest declined and sannin zukai became too expensive, so sannin zukai puppeteers could no longer make that profession a full-time career. Support should confirm that performers needed other primary work.

steps.title: Use present-day employment
steps.content: The strongest statement says remaining sannin zukai companies are mostly amateur troupes whose members rely on other employment. Choice A focuses on kuruma ningyo difficulty, Choice B says puppet costs later became comparable, and Choice C only defines kuruma ningyo. The answer is D.
